title: Forward Deployed Engineer
must_haves: Data whizz — extract insights from large, messy datasets
Sketch an architecture and deliver a production-ready solution in weeks
Communicate with engineers and business stakeholders; keen to travel
hard_blockers: Hard gate on Python proficiency + production-ready solution delivery — Ryan has no production SWE
Enterprise manufacturing / supply-chain & procurement domain, not crypto/Web3
FDE title here is genuinely an engineering role (analyse data, build architecture)
met_strengths: Agentic-AI enthusiasm and Claude Code building
Turning ambiguous requirements into concrete specs (founder's-associate muscle)
Strong stakeholder communication; thrives in early-stage high-ownership
one_line_verdict: Gates on Python proficiency and shipping production-ready solutions — a real engineering role Ryan cannot credibly clear despite strong agentic-AI and ownership signals.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via Ashby posting API (job-board/magentic). Note Magentic also has a separate 'Deployment Strategist' London role (5-6 yrs delivery) which is a closer-but-still-enterprise fit.
